henchman.name: Tito Trapaza
henchman.role: Forger of opera scores and theater blueprints
henchman.dossierNote: Former Teatro Colón sub-musician. Expelled for selling rehearsal tapes. Moves through stagehand crews and tango salons.

locations.name: Mendoza
locations.tagline: Wine country at the foot of the Andes

henchman.name: Vera Vicario
henchman.dossierNote: Trained sommelier. Forges vintage labels and uses high-Andean canal routes to move Carmen's contraband past customs.

locations.name: Salta
locations.tagline: Colonial charm in the mountainous north

henchman.name: Saúl Sandoval
henchman.dossierNote: Former muleteer on the old salt caravans. Now runs Carmen's relic pipeline through the Quebrada de Humahuaca.

locations.name: Córdoba
locations.tagline: Historic university town in the Sierras

henchman.name: Clara Cortázar
henchman.dossierNote: Dismissed university archivist with a key to half the Jesuit Block. Forges provenance papers for stolen manuscripts.

henchman.name: Iván Irala
henchman.role: Falls-boatman running goods across the triple frontier
henchman.dossierNote: Ex-park boatman with a black-market ferry route under the Devil's Throat. Carries Carmen's couriers between three countries before dawn.

locations.name: San Carlos de Bariloche
locations.tagline: Swiss alpine charm and glacial lakes

henchman.name: Berta Brügger
henchman.role: Chocolatier and forger of alpine permits
henchman.dossierNote: Third-generation Swiss-Argentine chocolatier. Hides Carmen's microfilm in pralines bound for Nahuel Huapi tour boats.

henchman.name: Ulises Urrutia
henchman.role: Disgraced expedition captain, polar relic smuggler
henchman.dossierNote: Stripped of his master's license after a Beagle Channel scandal. Sells berth space on southern cruises to anyone with a forged research badge.

locations.name: El Calafate
locations.tagline: Gateway to the Perito Moreno Glacier

henchman.name: Eva Errázuriz
henchman.role: Carmen's local fixer, masquerading as a glaciologist
henchman.dossierNote: Former Los Glaciares park scientist. Forges climate-research permits and books Carmen's escape routes across the ice field.
